summary: Document Upload and Download feature for Loans Module tested successfully. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All UI features verified working - Documents modal, employment type selection, document requirements, progress bar, upload/view/replace/delete buttons.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 404 for invalid document_id - should return 404 for non-existent document

critical_code_review_comments: Firebase Storage integration is REAL - not mocked. Documents are stored in gs://wisedrive-ess-app.firebasestorage.app/loan_documents/
3-step upload workflow working: 1) Generate signed URL, 2) Upload to Firebase, 3) Save document record
Document requirements correctly differentiate between SALARIED and SELF_EMPLOYED customer types
Progress bar correctly calculates completion percentage based on required documents only
seed_data_creation: Test document (ITR_2024_TestDoc.pdf) already uploaded for Rajesh Sharma (lead_id: c6691f1f-ecbc-446a-ab92-be5386eff6f7). Customer type is SELF_EMPLOYED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Upload feature fully functional. Firebase Storage integration is real. Test lead Rajesh Sharma has 1 document uploaded (itr_1 type). All CRUD operations for documents working. Employment type switching updates document requirements correctly.
